plugins.name: orchestrator-mcp
plugins.description: Dev-tools MCP server for the orchestrator ecosystem — write_findings pipeline contract for verify and checker agents.

plugins.name: orchestrator-hooks
plugins.description: Hook suite for the orchestrator ecosystem — SessionStart cleanup, SubagentStop verify-blocking, PostToolUse findings auto-context, PreCompact snapshot, SessionEnd audit, FileChanged verify-findings watcher.

plugins.name: orchestrator-agents
plugins.description: 8-agent catalog for the orchestrator ecosystem: reader (haiku), researcher (sonnet), thinker (sonnet), writer (sonnet), checker (haiku), reviewer (sonnet), verify (sonnet), tester (sonnet).

plugins.name: orchestrator-skills
plugins.description: Orchestrator workflow skills — /orchestrator-skills:orchestrator (agent dispatch guide) and /orchestrator-skills:orchestrator-plan (plan before coding). Activate with: Skill("/orchestrator-skills:orchestrator") in CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Python LSP via Astral ty — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Python files. Requires: uv tool install ty

plugins.name: vtsls-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript LSP via vtsls — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on .ts/.tsx/.js files. Requires: npm install -g @vtsls/language-server
